name: @gnoviawan/pi-litellm-auto-detect
description: Loads LiteLLM models from a remote /model/info endpoint on startup.
readme:
# @gnoviawan/pi-litellm-auto-detect

Loads LiteLLM models from a remote /model/info endpoint on startup.

This package is part of the `pi-template` monorepo and is installable as a Pi package.
